div.div:
Key Message
Raw Office / Visio / PDF / image evidence is normalized first; RAG does not generate the BRD. Reviewed module context defines the backbone; docs/specs/RAG/runtime/reports fill gaps; IEOV + SME review make every BRD claim traceable.
A1-A4 的执行支撑见 Diagram B：每个阶段都有对应 skills、产物和 gate。
